title: BCA Jobs 2026 – IT Executive
shortInfo: North Eastern Regional Agricultural Marketing Corporation (NERAMAC) Executive Recruitment 2026 is now open for 1 vacancy of Executive (IT Help Desk) for candidates with Graduate in BCA / B.Sc with applications accepted through walk-in interview on 28 May 2026 at the official NERAMAC office through the official website NERAMAC.

basic_details.organization_name: North Eastern Regional Agricultural Marketing Corporation
basic_details.short_information: North Eastern Regional Agricultural Marketing Corporation (NERAMAC) Executive Recruitment 2026 is now open for 1 vacancy of Executive (IT Help Desk) for candidates with Graduate in BCA / B.Sc with applications accepted through walk-in interview on 28 May 2026 at the official NERAMAC office through the official website NERAMAC.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the NERAMAC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in BCA / B.Sc. (IT) or PG in relevant IT Field or equivalent, Minimum 2 years experience in relevant field
qualification.details: Graduate in BCA / B.Sc. (IT) or PG in relevant IT Field or equivalent from a recognized institute/University. Minimum 2 years of experience in relevant field (Preferably Hardware & Networking Server Operators).

faq.question: What is the post name for the NERAMAC recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the North Eastern Regional Agricultural Marketing Corporation (NERAMAC) recruitment is Executive (IT Help Desk).

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Executive (IT Help Desk) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Executive (IT Help Desk) post.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 28th May 2026.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Executive (IT Help Desk) post?
faq.answer: Candidates should be a Graduate in BCA / B.Sc. (IT) or PG in a relevant IT Field or equivalent.

faq.question: What is the minimum experience required for this position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 2 years of experience in a relevant field is required, preferably in Hardware & Networking Server Operations.

faq.question: What is the maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 26 years as of 1st June 2026.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Executive (IT Help Desk) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 22,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the NERAMAC office in Guwahati, Assam (Pin code: 781019).
